blind_restrictions: No WebSearch/WebFetch. All verification via parametric knowledge only. Post-cutoff citations marked UNVERIFIABLE.

verdicts.title: HDAC3-NCoR Eraser Depletion by ECM Stiffness Creates Enhancer Stabilization Independent of Writer Activation
verdicts.key_strength: Genuinely orthogonal eraser-depletion paradigm inversion; best experimental design (triple orthogonal test); zero citation hallucinations
verdicts.key_risk: HDAC1/2 compensation; Fu 2024 was chondrocytes/Parkin context, not enhancer H3K27ac
verdicts.conditional_reason: Web novelty verification not performed (BLIND MODE); Fu 2024 and Xu 2023 post-cutoff citations unverifiable

verdicts.title: H3K27ac as 6-12h Temporal Window for TET2-Mediated CpG Demethylation -> DNA Methylation Mechanical Memory
verdicts.minor_imprecision: TET2 described as recruited via CXXC domain, but TET2 lacks CXXC (uses IDAX/CXXC4). Minor recruitment detail, not fabrication.
verdicts.key_strength: Novel TET2 handoff mechanism; internally consistent timescales; new evidence classes (5hmC DIP-seq, RRBS); priming experiment
verdicts.key_risk: TET2 co-occupancy at stiffness-gained enhancers entirely parametric
verdicts.conditional_reason: Web novelty verification not performed (BLIND MODE)

verdicts.title: Sequential Two-Phase Bivalent Enhancer Activation: YAP-EP300 Phase 1 -> UTX/MLL3-COMPASS Phase 2
verdicts.minor_issue: Dorighi 2017 journal inconsistently cited as 'Cell' vs 'Mol Cell' (correct: Molecular Cell). Formatting issue, not fabrication.
verdicts.key_strength: Most mechanistically specific; four-arm paralog disambiguation; five independently falsifiable predictions
verdicts.key_risk: UTX-COMPASS may be recruited independently via MLL3/4 PHD->H3K4me1, bypassing feedforward
verdicts.conditional_reason: Web novelty verification not performed (BLIND MODE)

verdicts.title: Integrin Force-Induced H3K9me3 Demethylation at Nuclear Interior Enhancers Creates Competence Windows
verdicts.key_strength: Creative competence window concept; Sun 2020 direct precedent; force magnitude sufficient (120-920 pN >> 5 pN)
verdicts.key_risk: Sun 2020 used cyclic magnetic bead force, not static ECM stiffness — fundamental methodological question; KDM4A identity speculative; 50% groundedness borderline
verdicts.conditional_reason: Web novelty verification not performed (BLIND MODE); cyclic->static force transfer unresolved; borderline groundedness
verdicts.borderline_note: Lowest-confidence CONDITIONAL_PASS. Passes primarily on Sun 2020 grounding, replication control in test protocol, and independent value of competence window concept.

verdicts.title: Dual YAP-TEAD + MRTF-SRF Programs in CTCF-Permitted Loop Domains
verdicts.key_strength: Novel data prediction (HiChIP dual-program under stiffness); all citations verified as landmark papers; elegant verteporfin vs C3-transferase dissection
verdicts.key_risk: Limited mechanistic novelty — mechanism is relatively obvious extension of known biology; empirical survey framing
verdicts.conditional_reason: Web novelty verification not performed (BLIND MODE); mechanism novelty is limited (data prediction, not conceptual insight)

minor_issues: Dorighi 2017: journal inconsistently cited as 'Cell' vs correct 'Molecular Cell'
TET2/CXXC: TET2 lacks CXXC domain (uses IDAX/CXXC4); minor recruitment imprecision

meta_validation.pass_rate_justification: 100% CONDITIONAL_PASS rate justified: these 5 survived 2 critique rounds + 1 evolution round from pool of 14; pipeline killed 4 before QG; Ranker eliminated 3 more; BLIND MODE prevents most common FAIL reason (NOT NOVEL); all have correct molecular properties and zero fabrications
meta_validation.strictness_note: All CONDITIONAL_PASS (no full PASS) due to skipped web novelty verification. Considered FAIL for C2-H7 (cyclic->static concern) but retained due to Sun 2020 grounding + replication control in protocol.
